scripts.dev: echo '🎮 Starting Daicer environment...' && concurrently -n "backend,frontend" -c "blue,green" "yarn dev:backend" "yarn dev:frontend"
scripts.build: echo '📦 Building all projects...' && yarn build:frontend && yarn build:backend && echo '✅ All builds complete!'
scripts.build:frontend: echo '📦 Building frontend...' && cd frontend && yarn build
scripts.build:backend: echo '📦 Building backend...' && cd backend && yarn build
scripts.start: echo '🌐 Starting production servers...' && concurrently -n "backend,frontend" -c "blue,green" "yarn start:backend" "yarn start:frontend"
scripts.lint: echo '🔍 Linting all code...' && yarn lint:frontend && yarn lint:backend && echo '✅ All linting complete!'
scripts.lint:fix: echo '🔧 Fixing all linting issues...' && yarn lint:fix:frontend && yarn lint:fix:backend && echo '✅ All linting fixed!'
scripts.lint:check: echo '🔍 Checking lint (CI mode)...' && yarn lint:check:frontend && yarn lint:check:backend
scripts.lint:frontend: echo '🔍 Linting frontend...' && cd frontend && yarn lint
scripts.lint:backend: echo '🔍 Linting backend...' && cd backend && yarn lint
scripts.typecheck: echo '🔬 Type checking all code...' && yarn typecheck:frontend && yarn typecheck:backend && echo '✅ All type checks passed!'
scripts.typecheck:frontend: echo '  🔬 Frontend...' && cd frontend && yarn typecheck
scripts.typecheck:backend: echo '  🔬 Backend...' && cd backend && yarn typecheck
scripts.test: echo '🧪 Running all tests...' && yarn test:frontend && yarn test:backend && echo '✅ All tests passed!'
scripts.test:watch: echo '👀 Running all tests in watch mode...' && concurrently -n "frontend,backend" -c "green,blue" "yarn test:watch:frontend" "yarn test:watch:backend"
scripts.test:coverage: echo '📊 Running all tests with coverage...' && yarn test:coverage:backend && yarn test:coverage:frontend
scripts.test:coverage:frontend: echo '  📊 Frontend coverage...' && cd frontend && yarn test:coverage
scripts.test:coverage:backend: echo '  📊 Backend coverage...' && cd backend && yarn test:coverage
scripts.test:ci: echo '🤖 Running tests (CI mode)...' && yarn test:ci:frontend && yarn test:ci:backend
scripts.qa: yarn format:check && yarn typecheck && yarn lint && yarn test
scripts.storybook: echo '📚 Starting Storybook component library...' && echo '  📍 http://localhost:6006' && cd frontend && yarn storybook
scripts.storybook:build: echo '📦 Building Storybook...' && cd frontend && yarn storybook:build
scripts.storybook:preview: echo '👀 Serving built Storybook...' && cd frontend && yarn storybook:preview
